claimText: The National Biofoundry Network is categorized as a Bio enabler component under the BioE3 Policy to scale up proof-of-concept projects.
evidenceExcerpt: India's first National Biofoundry Network was launched as a Bio enabler component of the BioE3 Policy to scale up proof-of-concept projects.
examUse: Statement-based question on the components and purpose of the BioE3 Policy.
distractorHooks: Categorized under a different policy like the National Health Policy
Described as a regulatory body instead of a Bio enabler

claimText: A Biofoundry is an automated facility that integrates DNA synthesis, gene editing, and biomanufacturing.
evidenceExcerpt: A Biofoundry is an automated facility integrating DNA synthesis, gene editing, and biomanufacturing.
examUse: Definition-based question or correct-pair matching for biotechnology terms.
distractorHooks: Confusing Biofoundry with a bioremediation site
Limiting it to only data storage or bioinformatics without manufacturing

claimText: The BioE3 Policy is India's first policy in Biotechnology and was launched by the Department of Biotechnology (DBT) under the Ministry of Science & Technology.
evidenceExcerpt: BioE3 (Biotechnology for Economy, Environment and Employment) Policy is India's first policy in Biotechnology. BioE3 was launched by the DBT, under the Ministry of Science & Technology.
examUse: Statement-based question on the nodal ministry and significance of the BioE3 Policy.
distractorHooks: Launched by the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
Launched by the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change

claimText: The BioE3 Policy aims to revolutionize biomanufacturing in sectors such as precision biotherapeutics, smart proteins, and carbon capture.
evidenceExcerpt: BioE3 aims to revolutionize biomanufacturing, including precision biotherapeutics and carbon capture.
examUse: Application-based question identifying the target sectors of the BioE3 Policy.
distractorHooks: Excluding carbon capture from biotechnology applications
Focusing solely on traditional agricultural biotechnology
